name: Shock Index
description: Rapid single-number indicator of hemodynamic stability. Calculated as HR / SBP. Normal is 0.5-0.7.
instructions: Divide heart rate by systolic blood pressure. A rising shock index indicates deterioration.

scoring.label: Severe shock -- immediate resuscitation, blood products

obstetric.note: Obstetric Shock Index (OSI) uses same formula. SI > 0.9 in pregnant patients is significant. Normal HR is higher in pregnancy (80-100 bpm).
